# dilationRates

**Instance Property**

Defines dilation rates for spatial dimensions. Must be four numbers, one for each spatial dimension, fastest running index last.

## Declaration

```swift
var dilationRates: [NSNumber] { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default value: `@[ @1, @1, @1, @1 ]`
